channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Pistons beat East-leading Cavaliers 133-122 and lock down 1st winning season since 2016
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Tim Hardaway Jr. scored a season-high 32 points and the Detroit Pistons beat the Eastern Conference-leading Cleveland Cavaliers 133-122 on Friday night to guarantee their first winning season since 2016.
item.dc:creator: DAVE HOGG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Michigan State's 2nd-half rally sends Spartans past Ole Miss 73-70 as Izzo wins again in Sweet 16
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jace Richardson scored 24 points and Michigan State surged past Mississippi in the second half for a 73-70 victory on Friday night in the NCAA Tournament Sweet 16.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Juan Soto slugs first homer for New York Mets against Astros
item.description: Juan Soto hit his first home run with the New York Mets, connecting in the third inning against the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: MiLaysia Fulwiley responds to tongue-lashing by coach and leads South Carolina into the Elite Eight
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Dawn Staley has seen a lot of growth in South Carolina star guard MiLaysia Fulwiley over the last few months. The Gamecocks coach wasn't happy with the way the sophomore was playing on either end of the court on Friday, so she lit into her in the third quarter.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A look inside the Tampa Bay Rays' 120-hour makeover of the Yankees' Steinbrenner Field
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Junior Caminero opened the narrow white door in his new spacious locker and the Tampa Bay third baseman discovered a bat Giancarlo Stanton left behind. Down the row at the other prestigious corner stall, pitcher Shane Baz had no idea he was in Aaron Judge's spring training abode.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: MiLaysia Fulwiley helps defending champion South Carolina outlast Maryland 71-67 in March Madness
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — MiLaysia Fulwiley scored 23 points, including a go-ahead layup with 2:22 left, and Chloe Kitts added 15 points and 11 rebounds to help No. 1 seed South Carolina beat fourth-seeded Maryland 71-67 on Friday in the Sweet 16 of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Gianna Kneepkens enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Gianna Kneepkens, the leading scorer on the Utah women's basketball team has announced she is entering the transfer portal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Brazil fires coach Dorival Júnior after worst defeat in World Cup qualifying
item.description: SAO PAULO (AP) — Brazil coach Dorival Júnior was fired on Friday after 14 months amid poor results and disappointing performances from the national team.
item.dc:creator: MAURICIO SAVARESE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sharks could be without veteran defenseman vs. New York Rangers
item.description: NHL: San Jose Sharks' Vincent Desharnais played through upper body injury Thursday against Toronto Maple Leafs
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Oluchi Okananwa and Duke beat North Carolina 47-38 to advance to 12th Elite 8 in program history
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Oluchi Okananwa recorded her third double-double of the season to lead ACC Tournament champion Duke past North Carolina 47-38 Friday and into the Elite 8 of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado rewards Deion Sanders with contract extension, becomes one of college football's highest-paid coaches
item.description: Deion Sanders coached Colorado to a 9-3 regular season record in his second year in Boulder. On Friday, he said he was grateful for the university's continued belief in him.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Scottie Scheffler ties record with 62 for the lead in the Houston Open
item.description: Scottie Scheffler opened with two straight birdies and was on his way Friday in the Houston Open, tying the Memorial Park record with an 8-under 62 for a one-shot lead when the second round was halted by darkness after a two-hour storm delay Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Spanish court overturns soccer player Dani Alves' rape conviction on appeal
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Brazilian soccer player Dani Alves won his appeal against a sexual assault conviction as a Spanish court overturned the ruling Friday in a case that lasted more than three years and saw the former Barcelona defender spend 14 months in jail.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Freddie Freeman’s wife shares positive update nearly a year after son’s rare diagnosis
item.description: Freddie Freeman's 2025 season is off to a bright start after his wife revealed that their son Max, 4, has been recovering well since being diagnosed with a rare neurological condition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Flagg flies in March Madness and Duke wins 100-93 over Arizona to reach the Elite Eight
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (AP) — Duke stud Cooper Flagg’s highlight reel included a 3-pointer from just in front of the logo at the halftime buzzer, one no-look pass for an alley-oop and another for a 3, and a huge blocked shot into a row of Arizona cheerleaders.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears sign DB Nick McCloud to 1-year contract
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed defensive back Nick McCloud to a one-year contract, bringing his NFL experience from the Bengals, Giants, and 49ers to the team.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Mitchell returns to Utah, leads Cavs past Jazz
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Jarrett Allen scored 18 points and Donovan Mitchell added 16, helping Cleveland snap a four-game losing streak with a 120-91 victory over the Utah Jazz on Sunday. Evan Mobley had 11 points, 11 rebounds and three blocks to help the Cavaliers get back in the win column.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Wave FC triumphs 3-2 over Utah Royals in home opener
item.description: San Diego Wave FC secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over the Utah Royals in their highly anticipated home opener match at Snapdragon Stadium on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC wins scoring fest over Tampa Bay, 6-4
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Logan Cooley and Alex Kerfoot each scored twice and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Tampa Bay Lightning 6-4 at Delta Center on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: McNeese's Will Wade signs a 6-year deal to become NC State coach, AP source says
item.description: McNeese coach Will Wade has a signed six-year deal to take over as N.C. State's next coach, a person with knowledge of the situation told The Associated Press on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Virginia hires VCU coach Ryan Odom, whose father was a Cavaliers assistant
item.description: Williams named VCU coach Ryan Odom — whose father was a Cavaliers assistant and who handed the program its most historic and crushing defeat in the 2018 NCAA Tournament — as the full-time replacement to Tony Bennett on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE BARBER, Associated Press, Fox 5
